title: abronia × minor
intro: Abronia × minor, also known as sand verbena or beach evening primrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Nyctaginaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Abronia × minor include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. Herbal preparations of Abronia × minor can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate a range of health conditions.
